fixtureDescription: Full Korean paragraph with no English content
passage: 오늘 아침에 학교에 갔는데 친구가 새로운 책을 가지고 왔어요. 그 책은 영어로 쓰여져 있었지만 그림이 많아서 재미있어 보였어요. 점심시간에 같이 읽어보기로 했는데 생각보다 어려웠어요. 선생님께서 도와주셔서 조금은 이해할 수 있었어요. 방과 후에는 도서관에서 비슷한 책을 더 찾아보려고 해요.
parseErrors: 학교|A1|Basic location word essential for daily communication.|4|Fundamental setting in the passage that frames the entire narrative.|아침|A1|Time of day expression used in basic temporal descriptions.|4|Essential for understanding when the events occurred.|친구|A1|Basic social relationship word necessary for elementary communication.|4|Key to understanding who brought the book and participated in reading.|새로운|A1|Common adjective describing something not seen before.|4|Critical for understanding the book's novelty and the friend's action.|책|A1|Basic object word for fundamental adjective meaning numerous or abundant.|4|Key descriptor for understanding the book's visual appeal.|재미있다|A1|Common adjective meaning interesting or fun.|4|Critical for understanding the speaker's describing the outcome of the teacher's help.|방과 후|A2|Compound noun meaning after school.|3|Temporal reference for the final planned activity.|도서관|A1|Basic noun for library.|4|Location where additional similar books will be sought.|비슷한|A2|Adjective meaning similar or alike.|3|Important for describing the type of books to search for.|찾아보다|B1|Phrasal verb meaning to search for or look for.|3|Describes the intended action of seeking additional books.|더|A1|Adverb meaning more or additional.|3|Qualifier indicating the search for more books beyond the first one.|
